display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1.20・触摸状态恢复修正版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: keeps the 0.33.24 prompt and runtime baseline, restores the current RabbitMirror from reasoning-wrapped messages whose inline SVG data URI truncated the DOM, preserves the complete style/body, strips inline events before direct DOM insertion, and safely reconstructs strict self class toggles for the current mirror only.
